学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has been rising in recent years (2021: 198th→2022: 185th→2023: 176th→2024: 165th→2025: 168th→2026: 157th). The comprehensive strength and recognition of the university have steadily improved, enhancing its appeal to candidates. No significant negative events have been observed in the reputation evaluation of Yanbian University. There is no record of a cutoff gap for this university in the abnormal application records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no A- or above disciplines, but as a comprehensive university, it has distinctive features in disciplines such as Foreign Language and Literature and Pharmacy. The Korean language major is unique nationwide, attracting specific candidate groups.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and other currently highly recommended popular majors, as well as Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and other relatively popular majors. Popular engineering majors help attract high-scoring candidates. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 149,400 (calculated based on the recent proportion of approximately 74.7%), an increase of about 6,000 (+4.2%) compared to 143,368 in 2025, intensifying competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, adjacent to Liaoning Province. Universities in the Northeast region have a certain regional appeal to candidates from this province. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Liaoning Province (88 students for Physics Category), making it one of the universities with higher enrollment among out-of-province institutions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline after the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion in 2026, the increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline.
